# Oppenheimer

Christopher Nolan's 2023 epic drama "Oppenheimer" is a 180-minute historical film that chronicles the life of J. Robert Oppenheimer and the development of the atomic bomb. With a production budget of $100 million, the film became a massive commercial success, earning $952 million at the global box office and receiving critical acclaim with an 8.3 IMDB rating and 93% on Rotten Tomatoes. The film's outstanding reception culminated in winning the Academy Award for Best Picture, cementing its place as one of the most significant films of the year.
